title: KiwiPack
description: Minecraft modpack that will make it way lighter on RAM and FPS.
body:
**KiwiPack** is a small modpack that will help you with making Minecraft way lighter. It reduces RAM and multiplies FPS!
It also contains some quality of life mods.

Resource Packs included:
 - Kiwi Branding by Andus (enabled by default)
 - [Simple Hotbar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/simple-hotbar/files/4574008) by amongstreality (enabled by default)
 - [Simple Grass Flowers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/simple-grass-flowers/files/3981346) by JamieProbably (enabled by default)
 - [Smaller Swords](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/smaller-swords/files/4542201) by driuf (disabled by default)
 - [SIMPLEX](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/x8-simplex/files/4516908) by heatswish (disabled by default)
